ogTitle: Wilsonton vs Wilsonton Heights: Climate Safety

heading: Wilsonton vs Wilsonton Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilsonton, Queensland and Wilsonton Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilsonton Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wilsonton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilsonton or Wilsonton Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilsonton has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Wilsonton Heights scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilsonton scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsonton Heights scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilsonton or Wilsonton Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilsonton Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
